hqArtifactBaseline.note: Current HQ fit artifacts prove queueing, persistence, and typed payload seams. The persisted draped_glb is still an authored-scene merge baseline, not solver-deformed cloth truth.

gaps: The committed fit-calibration report currently has zero assessments, so no production-grade region risk rollup can be derived from it yet.
No canonical Phase 0 body-region penetration or clearance histogram exists on the product route.
No golden body matrix or golden pose matrix artifact bundle exists yet for certification-grade gating.
Preview-fit metrics are still seam-level evidence, not end-to-end product latency measurements.
